parameters.description: Comma-separated list of properties to return
parameters.name: .proplist

copy-from.description: Certificate name from which to copy general settings

days-valid.description: Days certificate will be valid after signing

trust-store.description: Specify service which can use a specific certificate for certificate verification or trust-chain creation (www, sstp). (ipsec|wpa-eap|capsman|fetch|sstp|ovpn|mqtt|email|netwatch|radius|container|userman|lora|openflow|tr069|dot1x|dns|www|api|reverse-proxy[,Component*])

trusted.description: Wherever to trust certificate. If yes, certificate will be used for host certificate verification.

parameters.name: .proplist

eab-hmac-key.description: HMAC key for ACME External Account Binding (string value)

export-passphrase.description: Passphrase that will be used for exported certificate private key encryption. (string value)

type.description: Exported certificate type.In case of PEM, certificate will be exported with CRT extension, if export-passphrase is specified, also encrypted private KEY file will be exported.In case of PKCS12, certificate will be exported with P12 extension, if export-passphrase is specified, exported certificate will contain encryted private key.

passphrase.description: File passphrase if there is such (string value)

trust-store.description: Specify service which can use a specific certificate for certificate verification or trust-chain creation (www, sstp). (ipsec|wpa-eap|capsman|fetch|sstp|ovpn|mqtt|email|netwatch|radius|container|userman|lora|openflow|tr069|dot1x|dns|www|api|reverse-proxy[,Component*])

trusted.description: Wherever to trust certificate. If yes, certificate will be used for host certificate verification.
